description: Confounder: The model assumes kaiming_uniform_ always misinterprets fan_in for 3D expert wei

_meta.explanation: The rule 'SwiGLUExperts.reset_parameters uses std = 1/sqrt(hidden_size) for gate_proj/up_proj weights instead of PyTorch's kaiming_uniform_ because kaiming_uniform_ misinterprets the first dimension of 3-D tensors as fan_out.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes kaiming_uniform_ always misinterprets fan_in for 3D expert weights, but here the tensor layout changes so that kaiming_uniform_ actually computes the correct fan_in.
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'SwiGLUExperts.reset_parameters uses std = 1/sqrt(hidden_size) for gate_proj/up_proj weights instead of PyTorch's kaiming_uniform_ because kaiming_uniform_ misinterprets the first dimension of 3-D tensors as fan_out.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
